visual_anomalies: Heavy image compression and pixelation visible
Inconsistent text rendering - mix of clear and blurry text
Color inconsistencies - blue pill color appears artificial/oversaturated
Visible watermarks and grid patterns overlay (anti-counterfeiting measure sign)
missing_security_features: No hologram or security badge visible
No QR code scanner badge detected
Blister pack lacks traditional tamper-evident design
missing_critical_info: No manufacture date (Mfg date) clearly visible
No expiration date (Exp date) clearly visible
Lot number appears manipulated or missing
packaging_issues: Red warning box appears duplicated and misaligned
Printing quality below standard pharmaceutical grade
labeling_concerns: Directions for use unclear or partially obscured
Warning text has poor contrast and readability

why_its_fake: Multiple critical red flags detected: (1) Missing security features (no scanner badge, no hologram), (2) Critical missing information (manufacture/expiration dates not visible), (3) Visual quality issues indicating counterfeit production, (4) Inconsistent text rendering suggesting image manipulation, (5) Manufacturer address region does not match claimed company information.
recommended_action: DO NOT USE. Return to pharmacy/distributor. File report with drug regulatory authority. Seek prescription verification from licensed pharmacist.
safety_concern: Counterfeit medicines may contain incorrect active ingredients, harmful fillers, or no active ingredient at all, leading to treatment failure and potential health complications.
